instruction: Classify the type of vulnerability described in the CVE.
input: A vulnerability was found in Codezips Project Management System 1.0. It has been classified as critical. This affects an unknown part of the file /pages/forms/teacher.php. The manipulation of the argument name leads to sql injection. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
output: The vulnerability is categorized as an SQL Injection, which falls under the broader category of Injection vulnerabilities.
